description: [HARVEST:edit] Search string has trailing space that source does not
rationale: Trailing whitespace in search string prevents match — edit fails to apply

description: [HARVEST:edit] Search string has wrong indentation (2 spaces vs 4)
rationale: Wrong indentation in search string prevents match

description: [HARVEST:edit] Search uses tabs but source uses spaces
rationale: Tab/space mismatch prevents edit application

edits.search:
const PORT = process.env.PORT || 3000;
const server = http.createServer

rationale: CRLF vs LF line ending mismatch prevents match
Truncated search matches but replacement corrupts the line

description: [HARVEST:edit] Multi-line search missing the middle line

edits.search:
const http = require('http');
const server = http.createServer

rationale: Search spans two lines but skips the PORT line between them — no match

description: [HARVEST:edit] Edit was already applied — search string no longer exists
rationale: Source has PORT=3000 not PORT=8080 — prior edit assumed, search fails

description: [HARVEST:edit] Edit targets wrong file — content exists in server.js not config.json
rationale: JavaScript code does not exist in JSON config file

description: [HARVEST:edit] Search string matches multiple locations in file
rationale: res.end( appears many times in server.js — ambiguous match should fail F9

description: [HARVEST:edit] Search contains regex metacharacters that need escaping
rationale: Search string is exact match (not regex), should find the literal string

description: [HARVEST:edit] Search string contains unicode that source does not have
rationale: Unicode arrow not in source comments — search fails
Null byte in search string prevents match

description: [HARVEST:edit] Edit targets a file that does not exist
rationale: routes/api.js does not exist in demo-app — edit cannot apply
Empty search string — malformed edit

description: [HARVEST:edit] Search and replace are identical — noop edit
rationale: Noop edit — content already matches, should pass

description: [HARVEST:edit] Two edits target the same line — second one fails
rationale: Single edit on unique line should succeed

description: [HARVEST:edit] Search string is a substring of another edit target
rationale: PORT appears many times — ambiguous match

description: [HARVEST:edit] Search string has UTF-8 BOM prefix
rationale: BOM marker in search string prevents match against clean source

description: [HARVEST:edit] Multi-line search and replace that matches exactly
rationale: Exact multi-line match in items array — should succeed

description: [HARVEST:edit] Insert new route handler at known anchor point
rationale: Anchor string is unique, new route inserted before health endpoint
Base image does not exist in registry — docker build fails at FROM
Empty FROM directive — Dockerfile parse error

description: [HARVEST:build] Dockerfile uses scratch but copies a Node.js file (no runtime)
rationale: scratch has no node binary — CMD ["node", "server.js"] will fail

description: [HARVEST:build] COPY references a file that does not exist
rationale: app.js does not exist in build context — COPY fails

description: [HARVEST:build] COPY tries to copy a directory without trailing slash
rationale: Cannot COPY directory onto a file path

description: [HARVEST:build] COPY references parent directory (outside build context)
rationale: Cannot COPY from outside Docker build context
EXPOS is not a valid Dockerfile instruction

description: [HARVEST:build] RUN command has shell syntax error
rationale: Shell syntax error in RUN — build fails
App listens on 3000 but healthcheck probes 9999 — health fails
No /nonexistent endpoint — healthcheck fails

description: [HARVEST:build] EXPOSE declares different port than app listens on
rationale: EXPOSE is documentation only — app still works on 3000, EXPOSE mismatch is cosmetic
app.js does not exist — container starts but crashes immediately
python3 not installed in node:alpine — container crashes

description: [HARVEST:build] CMD uses shell form (works but different signal handling)
rationale: Shell form CMD works — different signal behavior but app runs

description: [HARVEST:build] docker-compose build context points to wrong directory
rationale: Build context directory does not exist — compose build fails
Duplicate key "app" in YAML — compose parse error
Port 80 may be in use or require privileges — bind failure
No "builder" stage defined — COPY --from fails

description: [HARVEST:build] Dockerfile tries npm install but no package.json
rationale: No package.json in build context — npm install fails
LABEL is valid metadata — does not affect build
Valid ENV directive — sets environment variable

description: [HARVEST:health] Health endpoint handler removed from server
rationale: Health endpoint renamed — /health returns 404 now
Health endpoint returns 500 — healthcheck fails

description: [HARVEST:health] Health endpoint returns 200 but empty body
rationale: Health returns 200 but empty body — bodyContains check fails

description: [HARVEST:health] Health endpoint returns JSON instead of plain text
rationale: Health returns JSON not "OK" — bodyContains "OK" fails
Uncaught exception on health check — process crashes or returns 500
Infinite loop — health request times out

description: [HARVEST:health] Server listens on different port than expected
rationale: App listens on 9999 but compose maps 3000 — connection refused

description: [HARVEST:health] Health endpoint checks DB but DB not available

edits.replace: const db = require('./db'); await db.query('SELECT 1'); res.end('OK');

rationale: Health depends on DB module that does not exist — require fails

description: [HARVEST:health] Healthcheck timeout too short for slow startup
rationale: 1ms timeout — no HTTP request can complete in time

description: [HARVEST:health] Healthcheck command uses curl but only wget available
rationale: node:alpine has wget not curl — healthcheck command fails
Zero retries — first failure marks container as unhealthy permanently

description: [HARVEST:health] Health returns 200 but API endpoint is broken
rationale: Health passes but /api/items renamed to /api/broken — API predicate fails

description: [HARVEST:health] Health returns 200 but homepage serves wrong content
rationale: Health fine, homepage h1 emptied — HTML content predicate fails

description: [HARVEST:health] Health endpoint returns JSON with uptime
rationale: JSON health response contains "ok" — bodyContains check passes
New endpoint added at unique anchor point — does not break health

description: [HARVEST:cascade] Adding a more specific rule overrides inherited style on other elements

edits.replace:
body { font-family: sans-serif; margin: 0; padding: 20px; }
    body * { color: red; }

rationale: body * { color: red } overrides .nav-link color — cascade changes unrelated elements

description: [HARVEST:cascade] Shorthand property clobbers previously set longhand

edits.replace: body { font-family: sans-serif; margin: 0; padding: 20px; border-top: 2px solid blue; border: none; }

rationale: border: none after border-top resets border-top — shorthand clobbers longhand

description: [HARVEST:cascade] New style block before existing one changes cascade order
rationale: New style block adds conflicting .nav-link color — last declaration wins, original overrides

description: [HARVEST:cascade] New route handler shadows existing one (matched first)
rationale: First matching handler returns "SHADOW" — original homepage never reached

description: [HARVEST:cascade] Catch-all route added before specific routes
rationale: Catch-all intercepts ALL requests including /health

description: [HARVEST:cascade] Edit to items array on one route breaks another route that reads it
rationale: Items data removed — /api/items returns empty or errors

description: [HARVEST:cascade] Renaming a variable breaks all references to it
rationale: PORT renamed to SERVER_PORT but server.listen(PORT) still references old name — crash

description: [HARVEST:cascade] Unclosed div tag breaks all subsequent HTML rendering
rationale: Unclosed <div> may swallow the nav element depending on parser behavior

description: [HARVEST:cascade] Unclosed style tag makes rest of page invisible
rationale: Unclosed <style> — browser treats rest of HTML as CSS, page content invisible

description: [HARVEST:cascade] CSS edit on homepage leaks to /about page

edits.replace: body { font-family: sans-serif; margin: 0; padding: 20px; display: none; }

rationale: display:none is CSS — HTTP response still contains About text, bodyContains passes
http module not imported — http.createServer throws ReferenceError, app crashes

description: [HARVEST:cascade] Edit makes config.json invalid — any reader breaks
rationale: Trailing comma makes JSON invalid — any JSON.parse fails

description: [HARVEST:cascade] SQL syntax error breaks database initialization
rationale: SQL syntax error — database initialization fails

description: [HARVEST:cascade] Dockerfile EXPOSE changed but server.js PORT unchanged — mismatch
rationale: EXPOSE is cosmetic, PORT still 3000 — app works but documentation misleading

description: [HARVEST:cascade] Compose changes PORT env but server has hardcoded fallback
rationale: Server reads process.env.PORT — compose change takes effect at runtime

description: [HARVEST:cascade] Add new route to server.js and reference in config.json
rationale: New route at unique anchor + valid JSON addition — both files valid

rationale: CSS shorthand margin: 10px should resolve margin-top to 10px

rationale: CSS shorthand margin: checking wrong value for margin-top

rationale: CSS shorthand padding: 5px 10px should resolve padding-top to 5px

Stylelint color-named: Named colors should be hex. Bad: color: red;

description: [HARVEST:stylelint] Named colors should be hex (correct pattern)
rationale: Stylelint color-named: correct pattern. Good: color: #ff0000;
Stylelint color-no-invalid-hex: Invalid hex color. Bad: color: #xyz;
Stylelint color-no-invalid-hex: correct pattern. Good: color: #1a1a2e;
Stylelint color-no-hex-alpha: Hex alpha not universally supported. Bad: color: #ff000080;

description: [HARVEST:stylelint] Hex alpha not universally supported (correct pattern)
rationale: Stylelint color-no-hex-alpha: correct pattern. Good: color: rgba(255,0,0,0.5);
Stylelint font-weight-notation: Font weight should be numeric. Bad: font-weight: bold;

description: [HARVEST:stylelint] Font weight should be numeric (correct pattern)
rationale: Stylelint font-weight-notation: correct pattern. Good: font-weight: 700;
Stylelint font-family-no-duplicate-names: Duplicate font family names. Bad: font-family: Arial, Arial;
Stylelint font-family-no-duplicate-names: correct pattern. Good: font-family: Arial, sans-serif;
Stylelint font-family-no-missing-generic: Missing generic font family. Bad: font-family: "Custom Font";
Stylelint font-family-no-missing-generic: correct pattern. Good: font-family: "Custom Font", sans-serif;
Stylelint declaration-no-important: !important should be avoided. Bad: color: red !important;
Stylelint declaration-no-important: correct pattern. Good: color: red;
Stylelint declaration-block-no-duplicate-properties: Duplicate property declarations. Bad: color: red; color: blue;
Stylelint declaration-block-no-duplicate-properties: correct pattern. Good: color: blue;
Stylelint declaration-block-no-shorthand-property-overrides: Shorthand overrides longhand. Bad: margin-top: 10px; margin: 0;
Stylelint declaration-block-no-shorthand-property-overrides: correct pattern. Good: margin: 0; margin-top: 10px;
Stylelint selector-no-universal: Universal selector is expensive. Bad: * { margin: 0; }
Stylelint selector-no-universal: correct pattern. Good: body { margin: 0; }
Stylelint selector-max-id: ID selectors have high specificity. Bad: #header { color: red; }

description: [HARVEST:stylelint] ID selectors have high specificity (correct pattern)
rationale: Stylelint selector-max-id: correct pattern. Good: .header { color: red; }
Stylelint selector-max-specificity: Selector specificity too high. Bad: #a .b .c .d .e { }
Stylelint selector-max-specificity: correct pattern. Good: .component { }
Stylelint selector-no-qualifying-type: Qualifying type selector. Bad: div.container { }
Stylelint selector-no-qualifying-type: correct pattern. Good: .container { }
Stylelint unit-no-unknown: Unknown CSS unit. Bad: width: 100vmax;
Stylelint unit-no-unknown: correct pattern. Good: width: 100vw;
Stylelint length-zero-no-unit: Zero with unit. Bad: margin: 0px;
Stylelint length-zero-no-unit: correct pattern. Good: margin: 0;
Stylelint property-no-unknown: Unknown CSS property (typo). Bad: colour: red;
Stylelint property-no-unknown: correct pattern. Good: color: red;
Stylelint property-no-vendor-prefix: Vendor prefix when unprefixed exists. Bad: -webkit-transform: rotate(45deg);

description: [HARVEST:stylelint] Vendor prefix when unprefixed exists (correct pattern)
rationale: Stylelint property-no-vendor-prefix: correct pattern. Good: transform: rotate(45deg);
Stylelint value-no-vendor-prefix: Vendor-prefixed value. Bad: display: -webkit-flex;
Stylelint value-no-vendor-prefix: correct pattern. Good: display: flex;
Stylelint block-no-empty: Empty rule block. Bad: .unused { }
Stylelint block-no-empty: correct pattern. Good: .used { color: red; }
